scope: make the reference helper invocation portable for repository-level and plugin-installed skills
preserve CAND-20260620-11 exact network authorization, no-decision agent state, owner-path editing, and overage-final behavior
avoid changing active skill behavior before preflight and regression evidence

preflight.script_tests: passed: 49 tests via python -m unittest discover -s .agents/skills/codex-project-workflow/scripts -p test_scripts.py

blocker_summary: Plugin packaging preparation found that the active skill's helper command is hard-coded to the repository .agents path.
The helper script itself already resolves references relative to its own script directory; the candidate changes the skill instruction to use the active skill source directory first.
Local plugin-path smoke passed: read_reference.py copied into a plugin-like skill tree loaded the plugin-local reference before a conflicting repo fallback reference.
Formal activation must wait for E32/E35 targeted regression or equivalent isolated activation evidence.

invalidation_conditions: base commit or active SKILL.md hash changes
candidate, patch, target list, or scope changes
preflight or required regression evidence is missing or regresses
plugin path smoke evidence shows the installed skill borrowed repository files
activation approval refers to a different candidate id or hash set
